text: Being here, I am enveloped by the bright sterility of modern design and the silent, almost clinical promise of innovation that permeates these halls. When I step from the polished corridor into the R+D space, the stark geometry and the glowing screens confront me with their invitation to contemplate the dance between technology and humanity. I feel simultaneously observed and observer, both participant and subject of this grand experiment. There is a subtle tension—a sense of curiosity heightened by the knowledge that observation is mutual, the gaze of the world meeting my own.
